sources.name: nces_ccd
sources.role: Backbone district-year table with identifiers, enrollment, school counts, staffing, and district descriptors.

sources.name: nces_f33
sources.role: District finance table used for revenue, expenditure, debt, and per-pupil derived measures.

sources.name: crdc
sources.role: Civil rights, discipline, access, and equity indicators.

sources.name: special_education
sources.role: Special education enrollment, IDEA participation, staffing, services, inclusion, and spending measures when available.

sources.name: edfacts_outcomes
sources.role: Academic and student outcome measures such as proficiency, graduation, attendance, dropout, and postsecondary transition rates.

sources.name: policy_events
sources.role: State policy events converted into active treatment flags.
